review_title: All the data sources you have always needed for your dashboards
description: Dataddo helped us to include data from special tools that we use daily, in order to create dashboards merging all the metrics that we need to drive our decisions.
author: Ali K.
pros: Easy connexion to Data Vizualisation Softwares
cons: The developments needed for a custom data source can be a little slow
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Dataddo enables us to easily bring data from all our data sources together so that we can create reports and dashboards that give us a holistic picture of our business. Dataddo saves us a ton of work and empowers us to easily extract the insights we need from our data spread out across our various CRMs, marketing channels, etc. In addition to the product serving our needs, the team has been attentive and has provided high quality support whenever we needed it. Overall, it's been a stellar experience working with Dataddo.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I have really enjoyed being able to combine my HubSpot data with my Google Analytics data to create Tableau dashboards.
cons: I had to contact support to add custom fields, but they were quick to respond so it was no big deal!

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The pros are that I’ve learned Dataddo doesn’t following basic business ethics guidelines and I won’t have to waste money on them in the future.
cons: Dataddo does NOT provide any functionality or customer supposed to cancel subscriptions. Our accounting team sent three cancelation requests via email and voicemails - all have been promptly ignored. The only way we can cancel is by disputing the charges and placing a block. Unethical practices that result in me highly discouraging anyone considering this solution.

description: Value for money. It works good and It has been helped us to conmect different data sources.
author: Javier M.
pros: User-friendly, even with no technicl background you can easily use it
cons: Time of response from Customer Service, sometime really slow.

description: The tool was really simple to use and saved us a significant amount of internal labour. Because of the variety of its supported sources, we were able to employ a single platform for our diverse environment.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I've loved being able to blend HubSpot and Google Analytics data to build Tableau dashboards. I enjoy Dataddo's offering's agility as well as its competitive price in comparison to other market participants. Dataddo is constantly available to assist with customizing and resolving our API requirements, and their client-facing and account management teams are second to none.
cons: Nothing comes to mind other than maybe improving the product knowledge base in terms of certain data kinds and measurement combinations. However, I feel that even a novice expert just getting started with data will quickly grasp the product.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: The best data consolidation software on the market
description: It's time to stop wasting my valuable time as a marketer and get back to what I need to do. Now being able to save over 4 hrs worth of time consolidating data for my reporting has made my end of month a breeze and I owe it all to Dataddo.
author: Adam D.
pros: The ease of use, being able to simply extract our marketing data from our facebook reporting, our Google Analytics, LinkedIn and even salesforce was a MAJOR help and MAJOR time saver.
cons: Not much, it did take a little while to learn everything but at it's heart it's a simple to use platform that any marketer looking to consolidate their data would be grateful for.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: They allow us not to take care about external integration with multiple data sources
author: Kamil B.
pros: Easy to build - friendly GUI that allow quickly build full connector from the scratch to your endpoint with preview available
cons: Almost from the beginning we are dealing with the issue about broken data connectors; manual restarts are necessary.

review_title: Tailored service at a fraction of the cost
description: The team over at Dataddo are always happy to help me and my clients achieve a fully customized experience and solution, they go above and beyond whenever I have a query or request, and the turn around times are second to none. I would hesitate to recommend them for all API requirements.
author: Jonathan G.
pros: I like the agility of the offering from Dataddo as well as the competitive pricing compared to other players on the market. Dataddo are always on hand to help customize and resolve are API requirements and their client facing and account management team are second to none.
cons: There can be some duplication in costings when pulling the same source of data which I have found is ineffective, but this is a small bug to bear.

description: I really appreciate the team at Dataddo (and its pro-customer approach), whose members are quick to respond to any inquiries and are constantly coming up with ways of how to improve the product based on our suggestions.
author: Jan I.
pros: The Dataddo software is very easy to use and intuitive. Having relatively low technical knowledge when it comes to data management and infrastructure, Dataddo makes it really easy for me to prepare and combine various data sources when creating data visualizations in Tableau.
cons: There is nothing I can think of other than potentially expanding the product knowledge base with respect to certain data types and metrics combinations. But I believe even a relatively little experienced professional only starting with data will get the hang of the product pretty fast.

author: Bart N.
pros: Dataddo provides a quite extensive library of available platforms to connect to. Their prices for certain connectors are very competitive. Their developers have even helped create a few custom connectors for us!
cons: Some connectors can yield unexpected results and the new UI can sometimes crash (on a positive note, it's happening less often now).

description: Um software com uma ideia muito boa, mas o custo está muito elevado, se comparado a moeda local e a moeda cobrada, o valor cobrado se manteve e algumas funções não existe/funcionam, algo que acaba impactando de forma negativa no uso
author: William G.
pros: O agrupamento e agendamento de atualizações
cons: Removeram uma das principais funções, a de copiar um source, agora praticamente tem que criar uma conexão do zero, o que para uma grande demanda de contas é bem trabalhoso ficar adicionando conta pq os campos não vem pré-selecionados igual o que foi copiado

description: The product was super easy to start with and saved us a ton of internal effort. It's breadth of supported sources allowed us to use single platform for our heterogeneous environment.
author: Premysl K.
pros: The best feature is that the no-code approach allows us to handle many use cases without significant effort with manual scripting.
cons: Sometimes the web UI can be slow to use but its not an issue if you have a standard internet connection.

review_title: Really easy to use and intelligent data integration tool
description: Really great experience overall - any issues I've had their customer service team has been prompt at helping, the UX is easy to learn and intuitive and the data integration options are rather robust.
author: Ben M.
pros: Very easy to use and intelligent in understanding how I want to connect my different softwares. I'm rather new to any sort of Tableau visualizing and this tool makes pulling in sources and combining data really straightforward.
cons: It wasn't easy to customize for some lesser known tools I wanted to integrate and the cost is higher than other options, but overall I would still recommend.

review_title: Great data connector software that allows us to seemlessly congregate important data sources
author: Roman M.
pros: Our team works with many data sources, and having most of them available to be connected via Dataddo simplifies our work in extracting data for our dashboards.
cons: There aren't any obvious cons to this software other than having to constantly maintain our data sources. Once in a while, they would need to be reauthorized and sometimes we don't get any notifications about it.

review_title: Great Software, Great Support at the best price
author: Charlie V.
pros: The software is incredibly good value for money, and the support is second to none. If a data connector doesn't exist already, one is created for you. Everything works seamlessly, couldn't recommend them enough.
cons: None spring to mind here, as the software is such good value for money.

review_title: Easy integration with our BI tools
description: Dataddo is helping us to prepare all our marketing data from various sources for reporting. We are working with multiple accounts and running dozens of campaigns and on multiple online marketing chanels. We appreciate especially fast help from Dataddo support when we need to change anything in the configuration.
author: Magdaléna Š.
pros: Easy deployment. We appreciate especially fast help from Dataddo support when we need to change anything in the configuration.
cons: There are no weaknesses for our use case.

author: Connor C.
pros: Being able to easily extract data from SFMC to Google Sheets.
cons: I haven't encountered any negatives so far.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Looked promising at first but too much difficulties with actual implementation
description: Golden tip: try the free trial first to see if it suits your needs. If you encounter too much issues, simply search another solution. Maybe for smaller implementations & other data sources it's good, but not for what we tried to do (social ads data import in Google Data Studio)
author: Benjamin B.
pros: The price is below similar competitors. Support team was also nice and quick to answer. Free trial to test.
cons: Difficult to implement (tried to import facebook & linkedin ad data). Luckily we've used the free trial first to discover that before actual implementation in our Google Data studio environment.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Best cost-benefit to Facebook Ads data extraction
author: Fernando Yuuki O.
pros: The price it's competitive compared to another data extraction for Facebook ads and really easy to use.
cons: I was to write they don't have integration to Google Data Studio but they do!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Our e-commerce data in Data Studio - FINALLY
description: We use local e-commerce solution which is not supported by any dashboarding tool. We managed everything manually and looking for the tool which can help us to make this processes automatically.
author: Ondrej P.
pros: - Easy-to-use - intuitive - good account management
cons: - Czech localization - There isn't too much that I don't like
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very easy to reach and ask questions. Great help in implementing.
author: Alexander R.
pros: We collect data from Google Ads and Hubspot into Data Studio. This allows us to evaluate cost per lead. And the best thing is that our external PPC person does not need to have CRM access. So there is a single source of truth, but everyone keeps to their specialty.
cons: I would like more training materials for beginners.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
